{{Infobox character
| name = Remnant of the Sword Sage
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Remnant of the Sword Sage]] is a mass of rippling [[liquid steel]] in human shape with a featureless, polished face.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Remnant of the Sword Sage]] has three spinning hoops on its chest: white, scarlet, and inky black.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Remnant of the Sword Sage]] can sprout six limbs of liquid metal from its back.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] suspects the [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] may contribute to her heightened awareness.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
